record.field: HashiCorp Vault is a secrets management platform that secures, stores, and tightly controls access to tokens, passwords, certificates, and encryption keys.

HashiCorp Vault is a secrets management platform that secures, stores, and tightly controls access to tokens, passwords, certificates, and encryption keys.

Vault provides a unified API and UI to manage any secret across an organization while enforcing fine-grained access policies and recording a detailed audit log. Beyond static storage, it can generate short-lived dynamic credentials on demand for databases and cloud providers, act as encryption-as-a-service, and manage the full lifecycle of secrets through leasing and revocation. It is the de-facto standard for centralizing secrets in DevOps, cloud-native, and zero-trust architectures.

Key features
  • Centralized, encrypted storage for API keys, passwords, certificates, and keys
  • Dynamic, short-lived secrets generated on demand for databases and cloud platforms
  • Encryption-as-a-service to encrypt and decrypt data without exposing keys
  • Pluggable authentication methods and fine-grained, policy-based access control
  • Lease management, automatic renewal, and instant revocation of secrets
  • Detailed audit logging of every request for compliance and traceability
Best for

Platform, security, and DevOps teams that need to centralize and govern secrets across applications, infrastructure, and cloud environments, especially where dynamic credentials, encryption services, and strong audit trails are required.

services: vault: image: hashicorp/vault:latest container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' cap_add: - IPC_LOCK environment: VAULT_DEV_ROOT_TOKEN_ID: {{ vault_dev_root_token_id }} VAULT_DEV_LISTEN_ADDRESS: {{ vault_dev_listen_address }} ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:8200' volumes: - ./vault_data:/vault/file command: server -dev -dev-root-token-id={{ vault_dev_root_token_id }} -dev-listen-address={{ vault_dev_listen_address }} restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
